metadata.name: Request a Payment Extension for a Utility Bill

description: A resident is having temporary financial difficulty and needs an extension on their water bill due date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the resident's account and current balance.

nodes.task_description: Review the account history and eligibility for a payment extension.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the account is in good standing and eligible for an extension.

nodes.task_description: Process a two-week payment extension for the resident.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the due date in the system and informs the resident.
